meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for AI Builders
content.seo_description: Overcome creative block with the Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly guide for freelancers to ship production-ready AI apps using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'blank page syndrome' by providing a modular, production-ready scaffold for AI applications. By leveraging Claude Code, you can automate the boilerplate setup, allowing you to focus purely on business logic. This workflow reduces development time by 70%, enabling you to deliver client projects faster.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blinking cursor, the weight of a client deadline looming, and the dreaded 'no project ideas' paralysis sets in. In the freelance world, time isn't just money—it's your reputation. The difference between a struggling coder and a high-earning AI builder is the ability to bypass the setup phase and jump straight into high-value development.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just code; it's a structural framework designed to turn vague concepts into shippable SaaS products. By combining this scaffold with the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a developer building from scratch into an architect deploying validated, professional-grade systems in record time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory and core dependencies to ensure a modular environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new professional AI SaaS project using the Antigravity base template, including TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Layer
steps.description: Map out the specific client requirements to the template's service layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer in the Antigravity structure that handles user authentication and AI-driven data processing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate service layer for auth and ai processing'

steps.title: Configure the AI Integration Bridge
steps.description: Connect the frontend to the backend via secure API routes provided by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the API routes to connect the frontend UI to the OpenAI/Anthropic SDKs using the standard Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'connect frontend to api routes for ai inference'

steps.title: Implement UI Components via Patterns
steps.description: Use the template's reusable component library to build the dashboard rapidly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library, including a data table and an AI input chat box.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate dashboard component based on antigravity-ui standards'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Run the automated test suite to ensure the build meets production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and build the production-ready static assets for deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run tests and finalize build'

pro_tips: Always use the 'dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file modifications before applying them to your production template.
Customize the Antigravity template's .env.example once and clone it; never manually configure environment variables for new client projects.
Leverage the template's built-in logging interceptors to debug AI responses in real-time without cluttering your main codebase.
Use Claude Code's context-awareness by pointing it at your existing documentation folder to enforce consistent coding styles across all client projects.
Optimize your build process by creating a custom 'deploy.sh' script that hooks into the Antigravity build lifecycle for one-click Vercel pushes.
content.next_steps: Once your project is initialized, focus on refining the UI and adding unique value propositions that differentiate your client's product from generic AI wrappers.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting time on boilerplate and start delivering high-end AI solutions that clients pay a premium for. You have the tools, the template, and the workflow to scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
